diagrams.title: Universal Quantifier Visualization
diagrams.description: Shows all elements in domain satisfying predicate
diagrams.purpose: Understand that ∀ requires EVERY element to satisfy predicate with no exceptions

diagrams.title: Existential Quantifier Visualization
diagrams.description: Shows at least one element in domain satisfying predicate
elements: Elements with at least one satisfying P(x)
Checkmark on at least one, rest can fail
diagrams.purpose: Understand that ∃ requires only ONE or MORE elements to satisfy predicate

diagrams.title: Negation of Quantifiers
diagrams.description: Shows how negation transforms universal to existential and vice versa
diagrams.purpose: Visualize De Morgan's laws for quantifiers and how negation propagates through quantifiers

diagrams.title: Nested Quantifier Order Comparison
diagrams.purpose: Understand how different quantifier orders change meaning and truth conditions

diagrams.title: Bound vs Free Variables
diagrams.description: Shows variables within and outside quantifier scope
diagrams.purpose: Distinguish between bound and free variables and understand scope of quantifiers
